ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-26-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Julie Conger, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, American Express Centurion Bank, a Utah State Chartered Bank,
Court granted Order for Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Matthew J. Ghali, an individual,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $17,672.88
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $435.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $18,107.88

Judgment signed in open court.

No other appearances made in this matter.
